1. Executive Summary

The reconnaissance phase for hackthissite.org has concluded. The analysis identified 62 primary high-interest targets from a total discovery pool of 62 assets.

Risk scoring indicates a CRITICAL risk profile based on observed vulnerabilities and exposed management interfaces.
